description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a predominantly yellowish-tan coloration, accented by darker brown and gray patches. Its surface is uneven, featuring a mix of smooth and slightly rough textures, with some areas appearing more weathered and pitted than others. The stone has a natural, organic form with no sharp edges, and its contours suggest it has been shaped by prolonged exposure to the elements. Subtle color variations and mottling are visible across its surface, giving it a realistic, earthy appearance. The stone's size and mass make it suitable as a physical barrier or decorative element in urban landscapes such as parks, sidewalks, or roadside verges. Its solid, dense structure implies it is composed almost entirely of natural rock material.
description: A medium-sized, irregular yellowish-tan stone with mottled brown and gray patches and a weathered, uneven surface. Its organic shape and solid build make it suitable as an urban barrier or decorative feature.
description_view_0: This view highlights the stone's broad, gently sloping top surface with visible yellow and brown mottling and subtle surface undulations.
description_view_1: This angle shows a more angular side with a pronounced peak and a mix of tan and gray hues, emphasizing the stone's irregular geometry.
description_view_2: The stone appears flatter and more elongated from this side, with a smoother surface and lighter coloration dominating the visible area.
description_view_3: This perspective reveals a narrower, more upright face with a rounded top and a blend of yellow and brown tones, showing less surface detail than other views.
attribute_location: urban park, roadside verge, or landscaped sidewalk
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or barrier on the ground
attribute_pattern: irregular mottling with subtle color gradients and natural weathering marks, no artificial carvings or regular patterns
attribute_weathering: moderately weathered with some smooth areas and minor pitting, indicating exposure to rain and foot traffic
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: blends naturally with soil, grass, or gravel, and may contrast with paved surfaces or concrete structures nearby
